verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm gonna turn up my praise… and drown out the doubt I'm holding my shield of faith… and I feel no alarm When the enemy comes… In like a flood I will raise up my standard… and overcome

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Satan, can you hear me… this line is for you You have no power… over what I go through Victory may be in Jesus… but Jesus is in me too So I will turn up my praise… and show you what faith can do
